creator: xelah-freebsd-pr@xelah.com
text:
Much of the time (not all the time, but maybe because my mouse often picks up constant tiny movements) things stop: keypresses don't appear, a browser doesn't respond to a back button press, etc. Move the mouse and then all these things happen at once, as if they've been held in a queue.

Fix: 

Remove 'Option "AllowEmptyInput" "off"', or leave the mouse on a washing machine.
However, X now thinks my keyboard is US layout, which it isn't (it's GB).
How-To-Repeat: Run xorg with 'Option "AllowEmptyInput" "off"' in the ServerFlags section.
